_comment: Single source of truth for quantitative model benchmark figures. Update this file when simulation parameters change — dashboard_updater will inject these values into the HTML automatically.

supply_chain._source: Python Monte Carlo simulation N=5000 | 8 suppliers | MTBF 7yr | recovery 3mo | USD 12B revenue at risk

ebitda._source: EBITDA Stress Monte Carlo N=5000 | vol=12% (from financial_summary.csv) | 96% cost ratio | USD 57B revenue

fx_hedge._source: Hedge Analyser Monte Carlo, FX-only positions (CNY+EUR+JPY+KRW)
